text: Use uv run, not bare python — the workspace runs in a uv venv.
When a bugfix prompt only needs code behavior changed, delete stale bug comments instead of replacing them with new explanatory comments.

When adding one new test to a file that already uses section comments, do not invent a new `# -- ...` banner. Insert the test body near the relevant section and leave existing comment styles unchanged.
If the prompt warns that broader cleanup is tracked separately, keep nearby TODOs and comment lines untouched; change only the requested logic and any explicitly requested regression test.
